com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class ModemParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.ModemParameters

  • public class ModemParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    The connect parameters for POSLinkModem.connect(Context, com.pax.poslink.peripheries.ModemParameters, int)

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  ModemParameters.AsyncMode 
      static interface  ModemParameters.BaudRate 
      static interface  ModemParameters.SerialParam
      Serial parameters for Data Bits, Parity Check and Stop Bits.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getAsyncMode() 
      int getBaudRate() 
      java.lang.String getSerialParam() 
      java.lang.String getTelephoneNumber() 
      void setAsyncMode(int asyncMode)
      Default is ModemParameters.AsyncMode.ASYNC.
      void setBaudRate(int baudRate)
      Default is ModemParameters.BaudRate.BAUD_RATE_1200.
      void setSerialParam(java.lang.String serialParam)
      Default is ModemParameters.SerialParam.PARAM_8_NONE_1.
      void setTelephoneNumber(java.lang.String telephoneNumber)
      The telephone number.

    • Method Detail

      • getTelephoneNumber

        public java.lang.String getTelephoneNumber()

      • setTelephoneNumber

        public void setTelephoneNumber(java.lang.String telephoneNumber)
        The telephone number. This is mandatory.
        Parameters:
        telephoneNumber - The telephone number

      • setBaudRate

        public void setBaudRate(int baudRate)
        Default is ModemParameters.BaudRate.BAUD_RATE_1200. Only accept value in ModemParameters.BaudRate.
        If not one of ModemParameters.BaudRate, it will use default value
        Parameters:
        baudRate - The baudRate, see ModemParameters.BaudRate

      • getBaudRate

        public int getBaudRate()

      • setSerialParam

        public void setSerialParam(java.lang.String serialParam)
        Default is ModemParameters.SerialParam.PARAM_8_NONE_1. Only accept value in ModemParameters.SerialParam.
        If not one of ModemParameters.SerialParam, it will use default value
        Parameters:
        serialParam - see ModemParameters.SerialParam

      • getSerialParam

        public java.lang.String getSerialParam()

      • getAsyncMode

        public int getAsyncMode()

      • setAsyncMode

        public void setAsyncMode(int asyncMode)
        Default is ModemParameters.AsyncMode.ASYNC. Only accept value in ModemParameters.AsyncMode.
        If not one of ModemParameters.AsyncMode, it will use default value
        Parameters:
        asyncMode - The mode for modem communication

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
